CEDAR WAVE HOLDINGS

Building with purpose, leading from within

"The safest place for ships is in the harbor, but that's not why ships were built." — Anonymous

About Us

Cedar Wave Holdings is a vehicle designed to funnel active and passive business interests, strategic advisory work, and other pursuits as a reflection of how we think about living a fully integrated life.

Background

Jonathan (Jon) Kuhlman is the President and Founder of Cedar Wave Holdings. For over two decades, Jon has been building, leading, and navigating the decisions that shape organizations and the people inside them. His career has taken him from the financial sector to one of the country's most recognized consumer brands, but the through-line has always been the same: seeking to live a fully integrated, fruitful life while helping others do the same.

Jon joined Simple Modern in 2016 as part of the founding team. Over a 10 year period, he helped build the company from startup to nearly $200 million in revenue — fully bootstrapped — becoming one of the world's leading drinkware brands. Jon built the B2B Custom business from the ground up, until he led the human capital efforts in his role as Chief Culture Officer. During this transformative 5-year stretch, the company achieved +200% growth in both headcount and revenue, becoming widely recognized for its values-based culture and out-of-the-box approach.

When the business reached a new level of maturity in late 2025, Jon stepped out of the role and took a three-month sabbatical to rest and reflect. That time was life changing for him and his family, giving him fresh perspective, and led to his decision to exit the day to day operations of Simple Modern in order to build something new.

Prior to Simple Modern, Jon spent years in the financial sector, most notably at RiskMetrics Group, a leader in risk management software for the investment community. During his time there he experienced the full business lifecycle: VC funding, IPO, and eventual acquisition by MSCI for $1.6 billion. Those years were instrumental in learning how companies evolve, and what it takes to scale with integrity.

Jon lives in the Oklahoma City area with his wife and two kids. You can find him on a run, fishing, or somewhere outdoors, cheering on the Sooners and OKC Thunder, writing, building community from his front porch, and thinking about how to experience more deeply the friendship and love of Jesus.

The Vision

The success at Simple Modern was tangible. But the real reward was learning how to value what matters most in the midst of it — how to steward faith, family, and friendships — and leading others to do the same. Jon has spent countless hours wrestling through the tensions of growth, scale, and achievement while staying rooted in what is true, what endures, and discovering more about himself along the way. The journey is still ongoing.

Through Cedar Wave Holdings, Jon pursues active and passive business interests in emerging opportunities, provides strategic advisory services to executive leaders and their organizations, and shares his vision of living a life with purpose and intention.

The Name

For Jon, cedar represents my Lebanese heritage. Lebanon — a beautiful country marked by both resilience and hardship — is known for its ancient cedar trees, long revered for their strength, durability, and beauty. In Scripture, they appear as symbols of righteousness and abundance.

Wave comes from my wife Liz's story. Liz spent her childhood summers at her grandparents' beach house in New Jersey — a place that helped shape her sense of identity and purpose. It gave her a deep love for the ocean — the surfing, the sand, and even the power of the water.

Like most stories, ours carries amazing joy, abundance, deep pain, and regular challenges. Individually and together, those experiences have shaped who we are, and continue to do so.

While we each have our own professional paths, we are learning to embrace vocation as something that flows from our marriage. Cedar Wave Holdings is a reflection of that pursuit — a desire to live and build with intentionality, woven together, and marked by the strength, beauty, joy, and adventure that are on display in the cedars and the waves.

Thought Leadership
